director.name: Colectivo Los Ingrávidos Colectivo Los Ingrávidos

this_title: The Sun Quartet, Part 4: Far from Ayotzinapa
introduction: The Sun Quartet is a solar composition in four movements, a political composition in four natural elements, an audiovisual composition in four bodily mutations. Part 4: the clamor of the people that shook Mexico after the night of September 26, 2014. The disappearance of 43 students from Ayotzinapa opened a breach in the Mexican political body.
chinese_title: The Sun Quartet, Part 4: Far from Ayotzinapa
